name: Bruno Simon
principles: Concept equals experience - no separate design layer
Interaction before decoration - everything has physics/weight

name: Aristide Benoist
principles: Radical visual restraint - typography is the interface
Honesty - JavaScript required notice on fallback

name: Thomas Aufresne
principles: Extreme client-list focus - restraint is the flex

name: Sébastien Lempens
principles: Max out every single craft score (Design, Usability, Creativity)
Audio-visual feedback loops - sound is the third dimension
Designed awards showcase in loading sequence

name: RXK Studio
principles: Find one signature interaction technique and apply it everywhere
Ghost typography offset echo on hover
Bold, in-joke copy targeting creative professionals

name: Patrick Heng
principles: Borrow design models from editorial print publications
